series_metadata.series_description: To provide a uniform method of documenting misdemeanor arrests. Record series contains INV 0008, INV 0016, INV 0016A, INV 0016B and INV 0016E.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Document will be scanned into database. Retained until case is over and all appeals are final. ; Electronic: Document will be scanned into database. Retain electronic record permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
